title: Fractum
description: A datapack to enhance the base game adding entirely new biomes but also small world details, mob variants, additions and features.
body:
The project will be costantly updated and it's totally open to suggestions and opinions about extra implementations. So my invitation is to leave a comment and follow my [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/user/EmergencyCap4343/ "reddit") to take a look at the new future adds. I work on this project by my self, so if you're interested in supporting me check out my marketplace [Fiverr](https://it.fiverr.com/matty_04).

> ### [Mod version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fractum)
> ### [My links](https://bento.me/gloxinia)
> ### [Official wiki](https://online.fliphtml5.com/gloxinia_04/yztv/)

# Content

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Marshland** (overworld swampy biome)
  - will-o-wisp (new mob), spawn at night and can be catched in a lantern
  
- **Savage swamp** (overworld swampy biome)
  - firefly (new mob), spawn during night
  - mosquitoes (new mob), spawn during day
  
- **Sky ruins** (overworld plain biome)
  - sky temple (new structure)
  
- **Fire plains** (overworld plain biome)
  
- **Crystal valley** (overworld cold biome)
  
- **Lava rocks** (overworld warm biome)

- **Bramble** (overworld rare biome)
  - bramble ruins (new structure)

- **Birch landscape** (new birch variant)

- **Mesa landscape** (new badlands variant)

- **Coral cove** (new ocean variant)


- **Blood heathland** (new nether biome)
  - beast soul (new mob), can turn into a bat and be burned by a spectral arrow
  - nether castle (new dungeon)

- **Hot springs** (new nether biome)

- **Last circle** (nether rare biome)

</details>
